subject: IDSIP Rubik cube case follow up

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Please find the IDSIP Rubik Cube case follow-up (Price Floor and RR study)

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 4

Do we see any abuse happening?

Even for trusted sellers we want USD 50 price floor?
